docs.name: Data Table
docs.description: Typed, zero-dependency data grid that auto-switches between a hand-rolled virtualized engine (10 to 100,000 rows) and a standard engine with row grouping and rowspan. Search, single and multi sort, multi-select, row expansion, frozen columns, column groups, pinned rows, and feature presets.

props.name: data
props.description: Typed row objects; the component is generic over your row type.

props.name: columns
props.description: Column definitions: id, header, accessor (raw value for sort/search/group), optional cell renderer, sortType, searchable, width, align, freeze, nested columns (column groups), and rowSpan.

props.name: getRowId
props.description: Required stable row id — selection, expansion, pinning, and windowing keys all hang off it.

props.name: preset
props.description: Feature bundle. basic: search + pagination + sort. advanced: adds multi-sort, multi-select, expansion, sticky header. enterprise: advanced minus pagination so large data auto-virtualizes. Any explicit prop overrides the preset.

props.name: searchable
props.description: Global debounced (150ms) case-insensitive search over searchable columns' accessor values.

props.name: paginated
props.description: Client-side pagination; disables virtualization.

props.name: pageSize
props.description: Rows per page when paginated.

props.name: pageSizeOptions
props.description: Optional page-size selector values.

props.name: sortable
props.description: Header click cycles asc, desc, none. Typed comparators (number/date/string) inferred from accessor values or set per column via sortType.

props.name: multiSort
props.description: Shift-click adds secondary/tertiary sort keys with visible priority badges.

props.name: onSort
props.description: Called with the full ordered rule list whenever sorting changes.

props.name: selectable
props.description: Checkbox column; the tri-state header checkbox selects all filtered rows, not just the visible page or window.

props.name: selectedIds
props.description: Controlled selection; omit for uncontrolled.

props.name: onSelectionChange
props.description: Selection change callback (fires in both controlled and uncontrolled modes).

props.name: expandable
props.description: Chevron toggle column; requires renderExpanded.

props.name: renderExpanded
props.description: Expanded panel content; works in both engines (the virtualizer measures expanded height).

props.name: expandedIds
props.description: Controlled expansion; omit for uncontrolled.

props.name: onExpandedChange
props.description: Expansion change callback.

props.name: groupBy
props.description: Column id to group rows by — collapsible group header rows; uses the standard engine.

props.name: virtualized
props.description: Force an engine. Default is automatic: virtualized when flat data exceeds virtualizeThreshold and no groupBy/rowSpan/pagination is active.

props.name: virtualizeThreshold
props.description: Row count above which flat data is windowed.

props.name: rowHeight
props.description: Estimated row height in px used for windowing math.

props.name: maxHeight
props.description: Scroll container height; the virtualized engine falls back to 480px when omitted.

props.name: stickyHeader
props.description: Keep the header row(s) fixed while scrolling vertically.

props.name: pinnedRows
props.description: Row ids kept visible directly below the header.

props.name: theme
props.description: Theme for default header/body colors when not overridden.

props.name: border
props.description: Show table and cell borders.

props.name: headerTextColor
props.description: Tailwind class for header text, e.g. text-neutral-900.

props.name: bodyTextColor
props.description: Tailwind class for body cell text.

props.name: headerBackground
props.description: Tailwind class for header background, e.g. bg-neutral-100.

props.name: bodyBackground
props.description: Tailwind class for body background.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes on the root wrapper.

variants.label: Basic preset
Advanced preset
Virtualized 10k rows
Grouped rows + rowspan
Column groups + freeze

docs.overview: DataTable is a typed, zero-dependency data grid built for 10 to 100,000 rows. It auto-switches between two engines: a hand-rolled virtualized engine that windows rows for large flat data, and a standard engine that supports row grouping (groupBy) and rowspan merging. Search, single and multi sort (shift-click), multi-select with a filtered-aware select-all, row expansion, frozen columns, column groups, pinned rows, and sticky headers work across engines. Presets (basic / advanced / enterprise) bundle feature defaults; any explicit prop wins.

scenarios.title: 100k-row event log
scenarios.description: Render an unbounded event stream with windowed rows — only the visible slice is in the DOM, and aria-rowcount still reports the true filtered total.

scenarios.title: Order management with selection and expansion
scenarios.description: Multi-select orders across pages (select-all targets every filtered row) and expand a row for details, with multi-sort via shift-click.

scenarios.title: Quarterly report with grouped headers and a frozen name column
scenarios.description: Nested columns render a two-level header while the name column stays pinned during horizontal scroll.

accessibility.screenReaderNotes: Sortable headers expose aria-sort and are keyboard-operable buttons with arrow-key roving between them. Selected rows set aria-selected; expand toggles and group toggles set aria-expanded; checkboxes and the search input are labelled. In the virtualized engine aria-rowcount/aria-rowindex reflect the true filtered total despite windowing.

changes: BREAKING: columns are now typed definitions ({ id, header, accessor, cell?, ... }) and rows are your own typed objects — Record<string, ReactNode> cells and { key, label, sortKey } columns are gone.

BREAKING: getRowId is required; freezeColumns/freezeCount/freezeLeftCount/freezeRightCount are replaced by per-column freeze: "left" | "right"; initialPage/onPageChange/getRowKey/paginationPreviousLabel/paginationNextLabel were removed.
Hand-rolled row virtualization (windowing) handles up to 100,000 rows; the engine auto-switches to a standard renderer when groupBy or rowSpan is used.

New: global debounced search, typed multi-sort with shift-click, multi-select with filtered-aware select-all, row expansion, row grouping with collapsible headers, rowspan merging, column groups (multi-level headers), pinned rows, sticky header, and basic/advanced/enterprise presets.
Accessibility: aria-sort, aria-selected, aria-expanded, labelled controls, and true aria-rowcount/aria-rowindex under windowing.
